languages.text:
The target's damage is reduced by −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
The target must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it suffers {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} shock damage with {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% armour penetration and makes the {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} with a −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} penalty.

Reduces the {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} dealt from the target's attacks by −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Targets with the Reject the Flesh feature suffer {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g}. The target's damage dealt is reduced by −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% for 1 round.

If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it suffers double damage and makes a test with a −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} penalty. Additionally, on a failed test, the target's characteristics are reduced by −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} until the end of combat.

languages.text:
Der Schaden des Ziels wird 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang um −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % reduziert.
Ziele erleiden {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} und müssen eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} bestehen, um nicht 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} lang mit {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}Betäubt{/g} belegt zu werden.
Wenn das Ziel mit {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Ablehnung des Fleisches{/g} oder {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} belegt oder ein Mechanismus bzw. eine Maschine ist, erleidet es doppelten Schaden und macht eine {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g} mit einem Abzug von −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}. Misslingt die Probe, werden die {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}Eigenschaften{/g} des Ziels bis zum Ende des Kampfes um −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} reduziert.

traits.locale_text: Reduziert den {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}Schaden{/g}, den die Angriffe des Ziels zufügen, um −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % für 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g}. Ziele mit dem Feature Ablehnung des Fleisches erleiden {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g}. Wenn ein Ziel ein Mechanismus oder eine Maschine ist, beträgt der zugefügte Schockschaden stattdessen {uip|IncreasedDamage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}, und seine {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}Eigenschaften{/g} werden bis zum Ende des Kampfes um −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} reduziert.

Der Schaden des Ziels wird 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang um −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % reduziert.
Ziele erleiden {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} und müssen eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligenz{/g} bestehen, um nicht 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zug{/g} lang mit {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}Betäubt{/g} belegt zu werden.
Wenn das Ziel mit {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Ablehnung des Fleisches{/g} oder {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g} belegt oder ein Mechanismus bzw. eine Maschine ist, erleidet es doppelten Schaden und macht eine {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g} mit einem Abzug von −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}. Misslingt die Probe, werden die {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}Eigenschaften{/g} des Ziels bis zum Ende des Kampfes um −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} reduziert.

languages.text:
Les dégâts que subit la cible sont réduits de −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
La cible subit {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} et doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}. En cas d'échec, elle est {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}étourdie{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.
Si la cible a la caractéristique {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Rejet de la chair{/g} ou {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g}, ou que la cible est un mécanisme ou une machine, elle subit le double de dégâts et doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} avec une pénalité de −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}. De plus, en cas d'échec, les {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} de la cible sont réduites de −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it suffers double damage and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} with a −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} penalty. Additionally, on a failed test, the target's {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are reduced by −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} until the end of combat.

Les dégâts que subit la cible sont réduits de −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
La cible subit {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} et doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g}. En cas d'échec, elle est {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}étourdie{/g} pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.
Si la cible a la caractéristique {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Rejet de la chair{/g} ou {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g}, ou que la cible est un mécanisme ou une machine, elle subit le double de dégâts et doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} avec une pénalité de −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}. De plus, en cas d'échec, les {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} de la cible sont réduites de −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

Réduit les {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} infligés par les attaques de la cible de −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Les cibles dotées de la caractéristique Rejet de la Chair subissent {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g}. Si la cible est un mécanisme ou une machine, elle subit {uip|IncreasedDamage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} points de dégâts d'électrocution, et ses {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}caractéristiques{/g} sont réduites de −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

languages.text:
目标造成的伤害降低{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}%，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
目标受到附带{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}，且必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则被{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}1{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}。
若目标拥有{g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}拒绝实肉{/g}或{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}特性，或者目标是机械装置或机器时，目标承受双倍伤害，且需要进行一项带有{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}减值的{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}。若检定失败，目标的{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}降低{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}点，持续至战斗结束。

If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it suffers double damage and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} with a −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} penalty. Additionally, on a failed test, the target's {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are reduced by −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
目标造成的伤害降低{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}%，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
目标受到附带{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}，且必须通过一项{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}智力{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，否则被{g|Encyclopedia:Stun}眩晕{/g}1{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}。
若目标拥有{g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}拒绝实肉{/g}或{g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}钢铁圣所{/g}特性，或者目标是机械装置或机器时，目标承受双倍伤害，且需要进行一项带有{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}减值的{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}。若检定失败，目标的{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}降低{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}点，持续至战斗结束。

目标攻击造成的{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}降低{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}%，持续一{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。如果目标具有拒绝实肉特性，此能力还会造成{uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。如果目标是机械或机器，则会改为造成{uip|IncreasedDamage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}点电击伤害，且目标所有{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}属性{/g}降低{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}，效果持续至战斗结束。

languages.original_text: Reduces the damage dealt from the target's attacks by −(10 − 4 × INT bonus)% for 1 round. Targets with the Reject the Flesh feature suffer (5 × INT bonus) shock damage. If the target is a mechanism or a machine, it suffers (10 × INT bonus) shock damage instead, and its characteristics are reduced by −(2 × INT bonus) until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: Reduce el daño infligido por los ataques del objetivo en un -{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% durante 1 asalto. Los objetivos con el rasgo Rechazar la carne sufren {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} 5 × bonificador de INT) de daño de impacto. Si el objetivo es un mecanismo o una máquina, sufre en su lugar {uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} 10 × bonificador de INT) de daño de conmoción, y sus características se reducen en -(2 × bonificador de INT) hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
El daño del objetivo se reduce un −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.
Los objetivos sufren {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} y deben superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} o quedar {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdidos{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}asalto{/g}.
Si el objetivo tiene la característica {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Rechazo cárnico{/g} o {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g}, o si el objetivo es un mecanismo o máquina, sufre el doble de daño y realiza la {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g} con una penalización de −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} penalty. Además, si falla la prueba, las {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g} del objetivo se reducen en −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text:
The target's damage is reduced by −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
Targets suffer {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} and must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it suffers double damage and makes a {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} with a −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} penalty. Additionally, on a failed test, the target's {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are reduced by −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
El daño del objetivo se reduce un −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.
Los objetivos sufren {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} y deben superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Inteligencia{/g} o quedar {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}aturdidos{/g} durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}asalto{/g}.
Si el objetivo tiene la característica {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Rechazo cárnico{/g} o {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum sanctum{/g}, o si el objetivo es un mecanismo o máquina, sufre el doble de daño y realiza la {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g} con una penalización de −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} penalty. Además, si falla la prueba, las {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g} del objetivo se reducen en −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} hasta el final del combate.

Reduce el {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} infligido por los ataques del objetivo en −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} % durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}. Los objetivos con la característica Rechazo cárnico sufren {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g}. Si el objetivo es un mecanismo o una máquina, en vez de eso sufre {uip|IncreasedDamage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} de daño de conmoción y sus {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}características{/g} se reducen en −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
Наносимый целью урон уменьшен на {uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}.
Цель должна пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Интеллекта{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} и в случае провала получить {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}оглушение{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ход{/g}.
Если цель является машиной или механизмом или имеет свойство {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Отбрось плоть{/g} или {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Священное железо{/g}, она получает {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} электрического урона с {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% пробития брони и проходит {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверку{/g} со штрафом {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}.
languages.original_text:
The target's damage is reduced by −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
The target must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Intelligence{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or become {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}stunned{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
If the target has the {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Reject the Flesh{/g} or the {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Ferrum Sanctum{/g} feature, or if the target is a mechanism or a machine, it suffers {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} shock damage with {uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% armour penetration and makes the {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g} with a −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} penalty.

traits.locale_text: Уменьшает урон, наносимый целью, на (10 + 4 × {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонус{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}ИНТ{/g})% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Цели с эффектом Отбрось плоть получают (5 × бонус ИНТ) {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g}. Если цель является машиной или механизмом, вместо этого она получает (10 × бонус ИНТ) электрического урона, а ее характеристики сокращаются на −(2 × бонус ИНТ) до конца боя.

Уменьшает урон, наносимый целью, на (10 + 4 × {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонус{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}ИНТ{/g})% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Цели с эффектом Отбрось плоть получают (5 × бонус ИНТ) {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g}. Если цель является машиной или механизмом, вместо этого она получает (10 × бонус ИНТ) электрического урона, а ее характеристики сокращаются на −(2 × бонус ИНТ) до конца боя.

Уменьшает {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g}, наносимый целью, на {uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Цели с эффектом Отбрось плоть получают {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g}. Если цель является машиной или механизмом, вместо этого она получает{uip|IncreasedDamage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} электрического урона, а ее {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}характеристики{/g} сокращаются на −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} до конца боя.

languages.text: 1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、ターゲットから攻撃されて受けた{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}%軽減する。肉体拒絶の特徴を持つターゲットは{uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を受ける。ターゲットが機械装置や機械である場合、代わりに{uip|IncreasedDamage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}のショックダメージを受け、またその{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}特性{/g}は戦闘が終わるまでの間{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}減少する。
languages.original_text: Reduces the {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} dealt from the target's attacks by −{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}% for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. Targets with the Reject the Flesh feature suffer {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g}. If the target is a mechanism or a machine, it suffers {uip|IncreasedDamage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} shock damage instead, and its {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}characteristics{/g} are reduced by −{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text: 1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、ターゲットから攻撃されて受けたダメージを(10−4×{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}INT{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}ボーナス{/g})％軽減する。肉体拒絶の特徴を持つターゲットは(5×INTボーナス)の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を受ける。ターゲットが機械装置や機械である場合、代わりに(10×INTボーナス)のショックダメージを受け、またその能力は戦闘が終わるまでの間(2×INTボーナス)減少する。

1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、ターゲットから攻撃されて受けた{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}を{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}%軽減する。肉体拒絶の特徴を持つターゲットは{uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を受ける。ターゲットが機械装置や機械である場合、代わりに{uip|IncreasedDamage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}のショックダメージを受け、またその{g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}能力{/g}は戦闘が終わるまでの間{uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66}減少する。

languages.text:
Hedefin verdiği hasar, %{uip|DamageReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} azalır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.
Hedef, %{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarına{/g} maruz kalır ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerIntelligence}Zekâ{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|Encyclopedia:Stun}sersemler{/g}. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tur{/g} sürer.
Hedef, {g|f:ed0acc1731834a89bda8cc52ec769e3d}Etten Kurtul{/g} ya da {g|f:780497b04a0944e59cb57e68bb9775c4}Demir Kutak{/g} özelliğine sahipse veya bir mekanizma ya da makine ise iki katı hasara maruz kalır ve −{uip|Penetration|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:Test}teste{/g} girer. Başarısız bir testte ayrıca hedefin {g|Encyclopedia:Characteristic}nitelikleri{/g} {uip|StatReduction|0b8058ef3f33406faebea94ee7967d66} puan azalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
